ENTREPRENEURSHIP ROADMAP

ENTREPRENEURSHIP students need practical, industry-relevant skills that connect classroom knowledge to internships, projects, professional practice, and global career opportunities.

BUSINESS MODEL CANVAS

BUSINESS MODEL CANVAS is a practical skill that helps ENTREPRENEURSHIP students prepare for real professional work.

STARTUP FINANCE

STARTUP FINANCE is a practical skill that helps ENTREPRENEURSHIP students prepare for real professional work.

MARKET VALIDATION

MARKET VALIDATION is a practical skill that helps ENTREPRENEURSHIP students prepare for real professional work.

PITCH DECK DESIGN

PITCH DECK DESIGN is a practical skill that helps ENTREPRENEURSHIP students prepare for real professional work.

DIGITAL MARKETING

DIGITAL MARKETING is a practical skill that helps ENTREPRENEURSHIP students prepare for real professional work.

SALES STRATEGY

SALES STRATEGY is a practical skill that helps ENTREPRENEURSHIP students prepare for real professional work.

CUSTOMER DISCOVERY

CUSTOMER DISCOVERY is a practical skill that helps ENTREPRENEURSHIP students prepare for real professional work.

BUSINESS REGISTRATION

BUSINESS REGISTRATION is a practical skill that helps ENTREPRENEURSHIP students prepare for real professional work.

E-COMMERCE

E-COMMERCE is a practical skill that helps ENTREPRENEURSHIP students prepare for real professional work.

LEAN STARTUP

LEAN STARTUP is a practical skill that helps ENTREPRENEURSHIP students prepare for real professional work.

WHY THESE SKILLS MATTER

PROFESSIONAL READINESS

These skills help students move from theory to practical work.

EMPLOYER DEMAND

Employers value graduates who can use tools, solve problems, and communicate results.

CAREER GROWTH

Building these skills early creates stronger opportunities for internships, projects, and jobs.
